business.headline: Rupee falls to record low amid crude oil shock: What it means for IndiaThe rupee dropped 0.6% to 92.3350 against the US dollar, breaking its previous record low of 92.3025 that was touched last week. Rupee has remained under pressure since the United States and Israel launched military action against Iran last week.

Stock market crash: IndiGo, SBI, Maruti among worst hit amid ongoing sell-offAmong the worst-hit stocks on the index were InterGlobe Aviation (IndiGo) and State Bank of India (SBI), reflecting the broad-based nature of the market decline.

Rupee sinks to all-time low of Rs 92.30 against US dollar as oil prices riseThe rupee slipped in early trade as investors turned cautious amid escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and a sharp spike in global oil prices.

Why Sensex crashed over 2,000 points todayRising Middle East tensions, a sharp spike in crude oil prices and renewed foreign investor selling triggered a steep sell-off on Dalal Street, sending benchmark indices sharply lower in early trade.
Sensex tanks over 2,000 points amid Gulf conflict, crude oil crisisThe S&P BSE Sensex tanked 2,444.51 points to 76,474.39, while the NSE Nifty50 lost 729.90 points to 23,720.55 as of 9:28 am.

Sensex, Nifty opening: Stock market to crash today? Check trading setupAt around 8:25 am, GIFT Nifty futures were trading at 23,749. This signals a nearly 3% drop for the Nifty 50 from Friday's closing level of 24,450.45.

Your bank knows when an investment plan isn't right. Why is it still sold?You trust your bank for financial advice and investments. But what if the person across the desk is under pressure to sell something else? In this article, we look at how sales targets shape what bank relationship managers recommend.

Let's set the record straight: Women are better at managing money than menThe financial world has long been seen as a man's playground. Yet from household budgets to investment portfolios, women are steadily proving that patience, discipline and long-term thinking, not risky bets, are often the real keys to managing money well.

Are bank lockers still the safest place for your valuables?Bank lockers are trusted to store gold and valuables, but recent cases have raised questions about safety. At the same time, getting a bank locker itself has become increasingly difficult, with waiting lists stretching months or even years in many cities.

Is buying a Rs 1 lakh iPhone on EMI a bad idea? Here's the math you should knowEasy EMI options offered by banks and online platforms have made it possible to buy these expensive devices with monthly payments that may appear manageable at first glance.

Domestic LPG price hiked by Rs 60, commercial cylinder up Rs 115 amid Iran warIndustry officials said the increase reflects a surge in global energy costs triggered by tensions and disruptions in West Asia, a region critical to global oil and gas supply chains.

Wall Street slides as weak jobs data, Middle East tensions rattle marketsthe Middle East conflict pushed up oil prices the most this week since Russia's 2022 invasion of Ukraine, bringing shipping through the strategic Strait of Hormuz to a halt.

Tariff refund system to be ready in 45 days: US customs agencyThe US Supreme Court had struck down Trump's tariffs, but did ⁠not say how the collected levies should be refunded, worrying small importers that the process would be prohibitively expensive and time-consuming.

Prachar Communications' Manyavar Mohey viral campaign crosses 300 million viewsThe campaign has already generated over 8 million organic likes and has crossed 100 million cumulative views on Instagram on the celebrity collaboration post within 72 hours, marking one of the largest celebrity-led moment marketing activations in India.

Brent Crude oil hits highest since April 2024 as Middle East conflict escalatesOil markets have seen a sharp rally this week. Brent Crude has climbed about 20%, while West Texas Intermediate (WTI) has surged roughly 25%.

Buying property in wife's or daughter's name? Save on stamp duty, loans and taxBuying a home is one of the biggest financial decisions many Indians make. But did you know that when a woman buys property in her own name, the purchase can come with added benefits such as lower stamp duty, cheaper home loans and useful tax deductions?

India holds sufficient crude stocks, no immediate fuel supply threat: Govt sourcesOfficials said India has sufficient stocks of petrol, diesel, LPG and natural gas. The government is closely monitoring the energy situation and reviewing it several times a day.

Sensex, Nifty end lower as Iran war lifts crude oil price; worst week in a yearThe S&P BSE Sensex fell 1,097 points to close at 78,918.90, while the NSE Nifty50 dropped 315.45 points to end the day at 24,450.45.

More women homebuyers now eye Rs 90 lakh to Rs 2.5 crore homes, says ANAROCKWomen are now choosing bigger homes, targeting premium price segments, and treating property as a long-term wealth-building asset, says data.

If crude oil hits $100 per barrel, here's what it would mean for IndiaIf crude oil surges past $100 per barrel, India could face a higher import bill, a weaker rupee and rising inflation, showing how distant geopolitical conflicts can quickly ripple into fuel prices and economic stability.

entertainment.headline: Calm, composure, dominance: Big B, SRK to Jr NTR, stars celebrate India's victory India celebrated its historic T20 World Cup victory as Bollywood and South film stars joined fans in congratulating the team online. Under Suryakumar Yadav's captaincy, India became the first side to defend the title and win the tournament on home soil.

Alia Bhatt shares heartfelt Women's Day card from daughter Raha, Ranbir Kapoor Actor Alia Bhatt revealed how her daughter Raha and husband Ranbir Kapoor made Women's Day memorable by creating a special card. She shared a thoughtful message about raising daughters.

Basil Joseph turns ultimate fanboy for Sanju Samson at T20 World Cup Final. Watch Malayalam actor Basil Joseph was seen enthusiastically supporting his friend Sanju Samson during India's T20 World Cup triumph. The actor proudly bought a jersey and dubbed himself president of Sanju's Kerala fan club.

Anirudh reveals SRK-Rajinikanth collab dream, sparks Jailer 2 buzz online Composer Anirudh Ravichander said working with Rajinikanth and Kamal Haasan on a recent promotional shoot felt surreal, while fans on social media began speculating whether the collaboration hints at developments around Jailer 2.

Jr NTR mobbed at Bengaluru hospital, fans damage escalator in frenzy Large crowds gathered at KIMS Hospitals in Bengaluru for actor Jr NTR's appearance, leading to security breaches, damage to property, and intervention by police. Videos of the incident were shared online.

Shots fired outside Rihanna's Beverly Hills home, 30-year-old woman arrested A 30-year-old woman was arrested after allegedly firing multiple shots at Rihanna's Beverly Hills mansion while the pop star was home.  According to the Los Angeles Police Department, no injuries were reported.

Selena Gomez showers husband Benny Blanco with birthday love, shares throwback pics Actor-singer Selena Gomez shared glimpses of her happy married life with Benny Blanco to wish him on his birthday. The singer-songwriter marked his 38th birthday on March 9, 2026.

Aishwarya-Abhishek light up wedding with Salaam-E-Ishq dance, Nita Ambani joins Aishwarya Rai and Abhishek Bachchan danced at Mudit Adani and Ananya Diwanji's wedding to Salaam-E-Ishq song. The couple also made a recent appearance together at Arjun Tendulkar and Saaniya Chandhok's Mumbai wedding.

No fear, all heart: Anushka, Sunny, Anil, others celebrate India's World Cup win Bollywood celebrities, including Anushka Sharma, Ajay Devgn and Anil Kapoor, celebrated India's historic T20 World Cup victory on social media. Their posts reflected national pride as Team India beat New Zealand.

After Trisha slams 'crude words' in cryptic post, Parthiban says sorry for remark Trisha Krishnan posted a cryptic response after comments made at an award ceremony drew attention online. Soon after her statement, actor-director R Parthiban apologised on social media.

T20 WC final: Aparshakti, Basil Joseph, Karan-Tejasswi cheer for India from stands Aparshakti Khurrana, Basil Joseph, Karan Kundrra, and Tejasswi Prakash were among several celebrities seen cheering for India at the ICC T20 World Cup final. The closing ceremony also saw performances by Ricky Martin, Sukhbir Singh, and Falguni Pathak.

Women's Day: Kangana, Kareena, Chiranjeevi, Ajay Devgn and others post wishes Chiranjeevi, Ajay Devgn, Kangana Ranaut, Kareena Kapoor, Hema Malini and Anupam Kher were among celebrities who posted on social media to commemorate International Women's Day on March 8.

Watch: Ricky Martin dances to Oh Ho Ho Ho at T20 WC final rehearsal, Sukhbir reacts A rehearsal video featuring Ricky Martin dancing to Sukhbir's evergreen song Oh Ho Ho Ho ahead of the ICC T20 World Cup 2026 final has captured fans' attention. Amid the social media buzz, the Indian singer has also reacted to the video.

Anurag Dobhal car crash: Aly Goni, Munawar Faruqui, Elvish Yadav and others react YouTuber Anurag Dobhal's car accident during an Instagram livestream has prompted strong responses from celebrities like Aly Goni, Munawar Faruqui, Elvish Yadav and Rajat Dalal. They addressed mental health, online trolling, and the responsibilities of social media influencers.

See Rashmika's response when Vijay said he's 'proud' of her award win Vijay Deverakonda congratulated Rashmika Mandanna after her Best Actress win at the Telangana Gaddar Film Awards 2025. Rashmika responded to her actor-husband with a heartfelt message.

Viral video: YouTuber Anurag Dobhal smiles from ICU after live-streamed car crash An early video to surface after Anurag Dobhal's car crash shows the YouTuber briefly smiling while lying in a hospital bed. Fellow social media influencer Yogesh Kathuria shared the video following a hospital visit after the accident.

Akansha Ranjan Kapoor marks Women's Day by revealing egg-freezing journey Actor Akansha Ranjan Kapoor revealed her decision to freeze her eggs on Women's Day. She celebrated women's strength through an honest social media post.

Explained: Why YouTuber Anurag Dobhal crashed his car during livestream The high-speed crash of YouTuber Anurag Dobhal, also known as UK 07 Rider, during a livestream has raised questions. Reports reveal what he said before the accident and the issues he claimed to face.

YouTuber Anurag Dobhal in ICU  after car crash on livestream YouTuber and Bigg Boss 17 contestant Anurag Dobhal, popularly known as UK 07 Rider is in ICU after a high-speed crash during a livestream watched by thousands.

Video shows US Tomahawk missile striking base near Iran school: NYTA video verified by The New York Times suggests a US Tomahawk cruise missile struck a naval base beside an elementary school in Iran's Minab on February 28, where 175 people were reportedly killed, many of them children. The findings appear to contradict remarks by US President Donald Trump, who had suggested that Iran may have been responsible for the strike.

Does India have low-cost killer kamikaze drones like Iran's Shahed?Low-cost drones are reshaping warfare, as seen in Ukraine for the last four years, and now in the Iran war. Iran's low-cost Shahed drones have inspired the US's LUCAS. In India, low-cost, deep-strike drone projects like Sheshnag-150 and Project KAL are picking pace.

Rupee sinks to all-time low of Rs 92.30 against US dollar as oil prices riseThe rupee slipped in early trade as investors turned cautious amid escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and a sharp spike in global oil prices.

WTF, miffed US told Israel after it hit 30 Iranian oil depotsIsrael's strikes on 30 Iranian fuel depots went far beyond what the US had anticipated when it was notified in advance, marking the first major disagreement between the two allies since the war began on February 28, Axios reported.

Virat Kohli's special message to 'chetta' Samson after Player of the Tournament awardT20 World Cup final, IND vs NZ: Star India batter Virat Kohli wrote a special message for Sanju Samson after he won the Player of the Tournament award after India's historic T20 World Cup 2026 triumph, beating New Zealand by 96 runs in the final at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad.

In photos: Inside India's T20 World Cup victory celebrationT20 World Cup: India delivered a ruthless all-round performance in Ahmedabad, overpowering New Zealand to defend their T20 World Cup crown as Abhishek Sharma, Sanju Samson, and Jasprit Bumrah headlined a dominant night.

Live: UAE responding to fresh Iranian drone attacks as Middle East remains on boilUS-Israel Attacks Iran Live Updates: As the Middle East war entered its tenth day, the US Central Command (CENTCOM) said a seventh American service member died from injuries sustained during the conflict. Iran also announced Mojtaba Khamenei, son of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed in last month's US-Israel strikes, as the country's new Supreme Leader. Meanwhile, US Secretary of State Marco Rubio ordered non-essential US diplomatic staff and families of government employees to leave Saudi Arabia, citing safety concerns. Meanwhile, Israeli airstrikes hit four oil storage facilities and a production transfer centre in Tehran and Alborz, killing four tanker drivers and triggering massive fires. Explosions were also reported in Yazd and Isfahan, while Iran's IRGC claimed drone and missile strikes on Kuwait's Al-Adiri air base. Follow IndiaToday.in for live updates in the Middle East crisis.

Parliament resumes today: Gulf crisis, no-trust motion against Speaker to dominate Live UpdatesThe second half of the Budget session will resume today with a stormy start, with Opposition MPs set to push a motion seeking the removal of Speaker Om Birla. Meanwhile, the government is expected to brief both the Houses on the escalating Middle East conflict, with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar delivering a statement.

How China is the biggest silent player in the Iran warAs the US and Israel fight Iran, China might look to be a silent spectator, but it is much more than that. Tehran is crucial for Beijing's oil supply, influence in the Middle East, and long-term Taiwan strategy. This makes the Middle East conflict far more significant for China than it might appear to be.

This has happened before! Why do we suddenly feel deja vu?In this edition of The Daily Why we will explore how that flash where a brand-new moment feels oddly familiar is not a result of a superpower or a glitch in the matrix. It is your brain doing something clever.

How Robotic Knee Replacement is Redefining the Journey Back to MobilityEarly consultation with an orthopaedic specialist is essential. Delaying surgery in severe cases can lead to worsening deformity and reduced functional outcomes.

Are we cooked? AI is frying your brain, Harvard study revealsA new study has found that many workers found themselves exhausted from excessive use of and interaction with AI tools at work, a feeling termed as "AI brainfry." Here is what this means.

Know your laws: Beyond physical abuse, how domestic violence takes different formsIndian law increasingly recognises that domestic violence is not limited to physical assault but includes emotional, verbal and economic harm that undermines a woman's dignity and autonomy.

Live: Entry closes, Class 12 Mathematics exam to begin at 10:30 amThe CBSE Class 12 Mathematics board exam 2026 will be conducted today, March 9, at examination centres across India and abroad. The exam will begin at 10:30 am and conclude at 1:30 pm. The paper will carry 80 marks for the theory section, and students will be given three hours to write their answers. Follow the CBSE Class 12 Mathematics Board Exam 2026 live blog for all the latest updates.

Watch: Gavaskar keeps T20 World Cup promise, dances with SuryakumarT20 World Cup final: Sunil Gavaskar kept his promise to Suryakumar Yadav and danced with the Indian captain after India retained their T20 World Cup crown in Ahmedabad. Gavaskar heaped praise on Suryakumar after the win.

Gambhir dedicates T20 WC win to Dravid and Laxman, says Jay Shah stood by himIndia head coach Gautam Gambhir has dedicated the team's T20 World Cup 2026 triumph to Rahul Dravid, VVS Laxman, Ajit Agarkar and Jay Shah. India beat New Zealand by 96 runs to win their third T20 World Cup title.

Iran names Mojtaba, son of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, new Supreme LeaderMojtaba, a mid-ranking cleric with close ties to the elite Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, had long been viewed by elements of Iran's ruling establishment as a potential successor to his father.

The boy who stayed: Suryakumar Yadav's 25-year wait for a Sunday in the sunHe waited longer than most for the India cap, longer still for the spotlight. Now in Ahmedabad, Suryakumar Yadav stands as proof that sometimes the game's brightest stars bloom last. From the boy who lingered at the nets in Anushakti Nagar to a World Cup-winning captain, this is his story.

sports.headline: Are we living in India's era of dominance in ICC events? Coach Gambhir reacts T20 World Cup final: Gautam Gambhir refused to say that it is an era of dominance for India in ICC events after they lifted the T20 World Cup crown. It was India's second ICC title win in a row.

Watch: Gavaskar keeps T20 World Cup promise, dances with Suryakumar T20 World Cup final: Sunil Gavaskar kept his promise to Suryakumar Yadav and danced with the Indian captain after India retained their T20 World Cup crown in Ahmedabad. Gavaskar heaped praise on Suryakumar after the win.

Emotional Ishan Kishan dedicates T20 World Cup triumph to late cousin sister T20 World Cup: Ishan Kishan revealed he lost his cousin sister in a car accident a day before the T20 World Cup final. The emotional wicketkeeper-batter dedicated India's historic triumph to her memory after the win.

In photos: Inside India's T20 World Cup victory celebration T20 World Cup: India delivered a ruthless all-round performance in Ahmedabad, overpowering New Zealand to defend their T20 World Cup crown as Abhishek Sharma, Sanju Samson, and Jasprit Bumrah headlined a dominant night.

Why didn't Glenn Phillips bowl more in T20 World Cup final? Santner explains T20 World Cup final: Mitchell Santner explained the reason why he used Glenn Phillips for one over during the T20 World Cup final against India in Ahmedabad. New Zealand also dropped Cole McConchie for the contest.

Three-time world champions, are India the greatest T20I side ever? T20 World Cup final: No men's team had successfully defended the T20 World Cup before this. India are now the only side to win three T20 World Cup titles, defend the trophy, and lift it on home soil. With achievements that no other team in the format can match, are India now staking its claim as the greatest T20I side ever?

Now in Ahmedabad, Suryakumar Yadav stands as proof that sometimes the game's brightest stars bloom last. From the boy who lingered at the nets in Anushakti Nagar to a World Cup-winning captain, this is his story.

After T20 World Cup win, India's next target is LA Olympics: Suryakumar LA Olympics in 2028 is India's next target, revealed India captain Suryakumar Yadav at the post-match press conference. The Indian cricket team is set to feature in the Olympics for the first time with the sport's return to competition.

Virat Kohli's special message to 'chetta' Samson after Player of the Tournament award T20 World Cup final, IND vs NZ: Star India batter Virat Kohli wrote a special message for Sanju Samson after he won the Player of the Tournament award after India's historic T20 World Cup 2026 triumph, beating New Zealand by 96 runs in the final at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad.

Gambhir dedicates T20 WC win to Dravid and Laxman, says Jay Shah stood by him India head coach Gautam Gambhir has dedicated the team's T20 World Cup 2026 triumph to Rahul Dravid, VVS Laxman, Ajit Agarkar and Jay Shah. India beat New Zealand by 96 runs to win their third T20 World Cup title.

MS Dhoni raves about Gautam Gambhir's smile after India win T20 World CupT20 World Cup 2026 final: MS Dhoni breaks his social media hiatus with a poignant tribute to Gautam Gambhir and Jasprit Bumrah after India crushed New Zealand by 96 runs in the final in Ahmedabad.

Suryakumar, Gambhir, Jay Shah visit Hanuman temple hours after T20 World Cup winIndia captain Suryakumar Yadav, head coach Gautam Gambhir, and ICC chief Jay Shah took the T20 World Cup trophy to a Hanuman temple only hours after India's win over New Zealand. The trio offered their prayers in the temple.

Justice for Samson, smile Gambhir: Arshdeep's reels after World Cup win go viralT20 World Cup 2026 final: Arshdeep Singh posted a series of reels after India hammered New Zealand in the final in Ahmedabad. The ones featuring Sanju Samson and Gautam Gambhir stole the show, as the left-arm pacer once again proved he is the king of comedy in the dressing room.

Not accountable to social media, only to people in the changing room: Gautam GambhirAfter India defended their T20 World Cup crown in Ahmedabad, head coach Gautam Gambhir said he is accountable only to the players and support staff in the dressing room, not to people on social media.

With Maheika by his side, Hardik wants to win 10 more trophiesIndia all-rounder Hardik Pandya is confident that he will win 5 or 6 more ICC trophies in his career. After the T20 World Cup win, Hardik thanked his partner, Maheika Sharma, stating that since she came into his life, he has been winning everything.

Jasprit Bumrah delighted to bury Ahmedabad ghosts after T20 World Cup triumphT20 World Cup final, IND vs NZ: India fast bowler Jasprit Bumrah said that he was delighted to bury the ghosts of the ODI World Cup 2023 final after winning the T20 World Cup 2026 at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad.

T20 World Cup: Fans celebrate across the nation after India defend T20 crownFans celebrated across the nation after the Indian team created history on Sunday, clinching an unprecedented third consecutive T20 World Cup title by demolishing New Zealand by 96 runs in the final in Ahmedabad. The Narendra Modi Stadium turned into a sea of blue as jubilant supporters watched India etch its name deeper into the history books with a dominant victory.

Named player of the tournament, Samson reveals he took help from Sachin TendulkarT20 World Cup 2026, IND vs NZ Final: Named player of the tournament for three successive 80-plus scores, Sanju Samson revealed he leaned on guidance from Sachin Tendulkar. Samson smashed 89 off 46 balls in India's 96-run win over New Zealand in the final.

No match for explosive cricket played by India: Virat Kohli on T20 World Cup triumphStar India batter Virat Kohli congratulated team India for winning the T20 World Cup 2026, beating New Zealand by 96 runs in the final at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad.

India's historic Men's T20 World Cup title defence: In StatsT20 World Cup, IND vs NZ: India won their third title after beating New Zealand by 96 runs in the final on Sunday, March 8 at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad. The Men in Blue scored 255 for five after which they bowled the Kiwis out for 159 in 19 overs.

Ruthless India defeat history in Ahmedabad, defend T20 World Cup crownT20 World Cup, IND vs NZ final: India hammered New Zealand in a one-sided final, posting 255 and then defending it by 96 runs in Ahmedabad on Sunday, March 8. Sanju Samson's sensational 89 and Jasprit Bumrah's magical four-wicket haul ensured India became the first team to lift three men's T20 World Cup titles.

Gautam Gambhir silences critics, completes rare T20 World Cup player–coach doubleGautam Gambhir completed a rare player–coach double in the T20 World Cup as India defeated New Zealand in the 2026 final at the Narendra Modi Stadium. Having been part of India's title-winning side in 2007, Gambhir has now lifted the trophy as head coach, answering critics who had questioned his aggressive tactics and bold selections.

Watch: Arshdeep throws ball at Mitchell, warned after refusing to apologiseT20 World Cup final IND vs NZ: Arshdeep Singh hit Daryl Mitchell with a throw during the 11th over of the second innings but didn't apologise to the Kiwi batter, forcing umpires and the captain Suryakumar Yadav to intervene.

Gautam Gambhir a proud coach after Abhishek Sharma lights up Ahmedabad: See picT20 World Cup final, IND vs NZ: Experts called on India to drop out-of-form Abhishek Sharma in the final. But, the team management persisted with him. The young left-hander responded with a 21-ball 52, which laid the foundation for India's 255-run total at Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad.

Stranded South African players allege England given priority for flight homeT20 World Cup: South Africa's Quinton de Kock and David Miller criticised the ICC for leaving their team stranded in India amid Gulf flight disruptions, questioning why England returned home first.

Samson breaks Virat Kohli's record with 46-ball 89 in T20 World Cup finalIndian opener Sanju Samson registered the highest individual score by any player in a T20 World Cup final during the 2026 T20 World Cup title clash against New Zealand at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad on Sunday.

Abhishek Sharma hits fastest fifty of T20 World Cup final, shuts criticsT20 World Cup, IND vs NZ: Abhishek Sharma shut his critics after hitting an 18-ball fifty in the final against Mitchell Santner's New Zealand on Sunday at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad.

Ravi Shastri's F1 themed toss introduction leaves Suryakumar in splitsT20 World Cup final: Ravi Shastri's rather unique toss introduction had India captain Suryakumar Yadav in splits on Sunday. Shastri, in his usual hilarious manner, introduced the two captains in Formula 1 style.

Suryakumar puts up brave face after losing crucial toss in T20 World Cup finalT20 World Cup, IND vs NZ: Indian captain Suryakumar Yadav lost the toss in the grand finale at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad as New Zealand opted to bowl first on Sunday, March 8.

Lin-vincible again as Lakshya Sen suffers All England heartbreak yet againLakshya Sen lost to his familiar foe Lin Chun-yi of Chinese Taipei in the All England Open final in Birmingham on Sunday. The 24-year-old suffered his second defeat in the final of the prestigious tournament, with his dream run ending in a straight-game loss.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
